headline: Apollo (APO) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Joining me to discuss our results and the momentum we're seeing across the business are Marc Rowan, CEO; Jim Zelter, President; and Martin Kelly, CFO.  Lastly, I would flag that we published several presentations on Athene's website last Friday, that provide in-depth insightful information about the asset portfolio.

headline: Apollo’s AI Venture And New Funds Reshape Growth And Profit Story
summary: Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) is joining Anthropic, Blackstone, Goldman Sachs and others to launch a $1.5b enterprise AI services venture. The new company is intended to bring advanced AI tools to mid market businesses and private equity portfolio companies. Apollo is also raising new capital for funds such as Hybrid Value Fund III and Accord Fund VII, focused on hybrid and dislocation oriented strategies.
